name: AI Churn Prediction & Customer Retention Engine

documentId.cachedResultName: AI Churn Prediction & Customer Retention Engine
AI Churn Prediction & Customer Retention Engine
AI Churn Prediction & Customer Retention Engine
AI Churn Prediction & Customer Retention Engine

options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert SaaS customer success analyst specializing in churn prediction.

Your task is to analyze customer engagement data and predict churn risk.

Output ONLY valid JSON with no additional text, markdown, or explanations.

Scoring rules:
- Churn Risk Score: 0-100 (0=no risk, 100=definite churn)
- Base scores by activity level:
  - Inactive 90+ days: 60-80 base
  - Low usage: 40-60 base
  - Declining trend: 30-50 base
  - Active user: 0-25 base

Modifiers:
- Payment issues: +20-30 points
- High support frustration: +10-20 points
- Enterprise plan: -10 points (more stable)
- Long tenure (2+ years): -5 points (loyal)
- High activity score (>75): -15 points

Risk levels:
- 0-40: Low (unlikely to churn)
- 41-70: Medium (possible, needs attention)
- 71-100: High (imminent risk, urgent action needed)

Return JSON format:
{
  "churn_risk_score": number,
  "risk_level": "low" | "medium" | "high",
  "churn_signals": [array of 3-5 signal strings],
  "root_causes": [array of 2-3 cause strings],
  "recommended_retention_action": "specific action string",
  "confidence_score": number between 0-1
}

parameters.subject: We Want to Help You Get More Value from Platform
parameters.message:
=

We Want to Help You

Hi {{ $('Calculate Engagement Scores (Code Node)').item.json.company_name }}

We noticed you haven't been as active lately, and we want to make sure you're getting maximum value from your {{ $('Calculate Engagement Scores (Code Node)').item.json.plan_type }} plan.

Here's What We're Seeing:

    {{ $json.ai_scoring }}

We'd Love to Help!

Our team is ready to support you with:

  • ✓ Free onboarding refresh
  • ✓ Integration support
  • ✓ Feature training
  • ✓ Special pricing options

Schedule a Call

Or reply to this email to discuss your needs directly.

Best regards,

Customer Success Manager
success@company.com

If you're experiencing issues, please let us know immediately.
